## 6. Blast Radius

_What parts of the system does this feature touch? What could break?_

### Components Affected

| Component | Impact | Risk Level |
|-----------|--------|------------|
| | Direct / Indirect | Low / Med / High |

### Data Impact

- **Database changes**: None / Migration required / Schema change
- **Existing data**: Preserved / Requires re-processing / Destructive
- **Rollback complexity**: Simple / Moderate / Difficult
